package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for timeoutless_http_default_client_or_helper_call: net/http helper calls or http.DefaultClient usage that carry no explicit application timeout.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: warning.
func scenario401Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
